title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 158.75 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holds at 1.1805 as ECB's Rehn notes Middle East war raises inflation risks; ECB-BoE rate differential may weigh on the pair.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading at 0.7127 with RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; however, 88% of retail traders are short, indicating potential squeeze risk.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 18.4 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.02%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: JPY no longer acting as safe haven, z=+1.39σ; monitor for regime shift implications.
